title: Verify 'Remember Me' functionality creates a persistent session
description: Tests that checking the 'Remember Me' box during login results in a session that persists after closing and reopening the browser.

steps.description: 5. Verify successful login and redirection to the dashboard.
6. Close the browser completely (not just the tab).
7. Re-open the browser and navigate directly to the application's dashboard URL.

expected_result: The user remains logged in and can see the dashboard without needing to re-enter credentials. The session should persist for 30 days.
